channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court to Examine Plea on West Bengal Voter List Freezing Before Assembly Elections
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has announced that it will hear petitions on Monday challenging the Election Commission's decision to freeze the electoral rolls in West Bengal ahead of the forthcoming Asse...

item.title: Europe’s New Border System Causes Delays for Canadian Travellers
item.description: Starting April 10, 2026, the European Union's Entry/Exit System (EES) came fully into effect, requiring Canadians and other non-EU nationals to submit biometric data upon entry to Schengen Area countr...

item.title: Limited funding received by Trump’s Board of Peace delays Gaza reconstruction and governance transition
item.description: Donald Trump’s Board of Peace, established to oversee the post-ceasefire governance and reconstruction of Gaza, has received only a small portion of the US$17-billion pledged by Gulf Arab states and o...

item.title: Filipino and US troops collaborate on multi-purpose hall project in Davao del Norte
item.description: Filipino and American soldiers have joined forces to construct a multi-purpose building in Barangay Tibulao, Carmen, Davao del Norte, aimed at fostering peace dialogues and other community activities....

item.title: Exploring Lamar Odom's Struggles Beyond Fame and Success
item.description: Netflix's documentary 'Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom' offers a candid and humanising portrayal of the former NBA star, going far beyond the sensational headlines that dominated his public lif...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Announce Wedding Date and New York Venue
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have reportedly finalized the date and location for their upcoming wedding. According to Page Six, save-the-dates have been sent to guests, confirming the wedding will ta...

item.title: Petition Seeks Suspension of Energy CS Wandayi Amid Alleged Substandard Fuel Imports
item.description: A legal petition has been filed in Kenya seeking the suspension of Energy and Petroleum Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi over alleged involvement in importing substandard fuel. The petitioner wants the...

item.title: Kakamega Woman Rep Elsie Muhanda Files KSh 115 Million Defamation Suit Against Governor Ferdinand Barasa, His Wife and Bloggers
item.description: Kakamega Woman Representative Elsie Muhanda has taken a bold step by dragging Governor Ferdinand Barasa, his wife Professor Janet Kassily Barasa, and eight bloggers to court in a big defamation case. ...

item.title: Midnight Phantom Chapter 6: Brandon Attempts to Frighten Nadja in Part 1
item.description: In the latest chapter of the hit series Midnight Phantom, tensions rise as Brandon tries to scare Nadja in this suspenseful episode. The story follows Nadja Ann dela Merced, who finds herself drawn to...

item.title: Artemis II Mission’s Return to Earth: How and When to Watch the Splashdown
item.description: After a historic 10-day mission that took the Artemis II crew to the far side of the moon, the astronauts are on their way back to Earth. The splashdown is scheduled for Friday evening, April 10, 2026...

item.title: Keir Starmer warns Iran conflict could shape UK for a generation
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer has warned that the conflict involving Iran will have long-lasting consequences and could define a generation. Speaking on the last day of his trip to the Gulf region, the Prime Minis...

item.title: Durban City and Golden Arrows look to rebound in crucial KZN derby
item.description: Durban City will be aiming to bounce back when they host Lamontville Golden Arrows in a pivotal Betway Premiership derby at King Goodwill Zwelithini Stadium this Saturday at 3pm. The Durban side narro...

item.title: Air France Expands Nairobi-Paris Service to Meet Growing East Africa Travel Demand
item.description: Air France is stepping up its presence in East Africa by increasing passenger capacity on its Nairobi route starting May 2026. The airline will deploy a larger Boeing 777-200 aircraft on the Nairobi-P...

item.title: High Rent and Housing Shortage Making Life Hard for People in Nigerian Cities
item.description: Housing cost for Nigerian cities like Lagos, Abuja, Ibadan and Port Harcourt don become one of the biggest expenses wey dey pressure workers every month. Many tenants must pay one or two years rent up...

item.title: Patrice Talon's Reforms Reshape Benin's Presidential Elections and Political Landscape
item.description: Benin voters are heading to the polls on April 12, 2026, in a presidential election shaped by substantial political reforms introduced by Patrice Talon. Since taking office, Talon has overhauled Benin...

item.title: Police investigate death of three-month-old girl in suspected dog attack in Redcar
item.description: A three-month-old baby girl has tragically died following a suspected dog attack at a home in Dormanstown, Redcar. Police were called to Hardale Grove shortly after 13:30 BST on Thursday amid reports ...

item.title: President Ruto Nominates Kepha Omae and Seven Others to Steward the National Cohesion and Integration Commission
item.description: President William Ruto has named Kepha Omae as the new Chairperson of the National Cohesion and Integration Commission (NCIC), alongside seven nominees who will serve as commissioners. The announcemen...

item.title: Edo State Government Shuts Down Event Centre Days After Eedris Abdulkareem Criticised President Tinubu
item.description: The Edo State government has shut down an event centre in the state just days after veteran Nigerian rapper Eedris Abdulkareem used the stage to deliver strong criticism against President Bola Tinubu....

item.title: A roundup of political cartoons from across the U.S. for the week in politics
item.description: The article presents a gallery of political cartoons produced by leading editorial cartoonists across the United States, offering a satirical and often pointed look at the past week’s political events...

item.title: Pakistan enhances security arrangements in Islamabad for upcoming US-Iran peace talks
item.description: Pakistan has intensified security measures in Islamabad ahead of crucial peace talks between the United States and Iran scheduled for Saturday. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi chaired a high-level meet...
